name: Soham Patil
subheading: Building Intelligent Products • Solving Real-world Problems • Startup Mindset
mission_statement: I consistently build meaningful AI products, learn continuously, solve real-world problems, and maintain the builder's mindset required to build a startup.

building.name: CrimeFace
building.description: Facial recognition suspect profiling vector search.

projects.name: MindMirror
projects.description: An AI-powered mental well-being tracking journal that parses user sentiment, captures cognitive distortions, and presents a visual mental health dashboard.
projects.problem: Mental health tracking is often manual, tedious, and lacks objective, actionable insights.
projects.solution: Automated sentiment parsing via NLP, identifying psychological distortion patterns, and summarizing emotional trends over time.
projects.roadmap: Add voice diary sentiment analysis and real-time therapist sharing integration.

projects.name: CrimeFace
projects.description: An intelligent facial recognition and suspect profiling system designed for security operations and automated search in high-density databases.
projects.problem: CCTV suspect search is manual, slow, and prone to human error during emergencies.
projects.solution: Implemented deep learning face embedding networks connected to a vector database (Milvus/Pinecone) for sub-millisecond retrieval across millions of face signatures.
projects.roadmap: Add multi-camera real-time video stream tracking and occlusion handling.

projects.name: Turfly
projects.description: A comprehensive sports turf reservation and local matchmaking application designed to bring together athletes and streamline venue reservations.
projects.problem: Sports venue booking is fragmented and finding players for local amateur matches is extremely difficult.
projects.solution: Built a unified booking calendar with a built-in matchmaking social layer allowing players to create, discover, and join local games.
projects.roadmap: Integrate automated league tournaments and split-billing payments in-app.

learning_journey.detail: Learned algorithms and core computer science fundamentals.
Built native mobile experiences and mobile user interactions.
Architected real-time synchronizations and serverless databases.
Developed responsive web architectures and solid REST API backends.
Transitioned to building intelligent products using deep neural networks.
Worked with CNNs, face embeddings, and real-time image processing.
Integrated vector search engines with LLMs to query domain-specific data.
Building autonomous, tool-calling multi-agent execution graphs.

goals.name: Open Source Contributions
goals.desc: Contribute to core LLM frameworks like LangChain, LlamaIndex, and AutoGen.

goals.name: Deploy AI Micro-SaaS
goals.desc: Launch 3 production-grade intelligent micro-SaaS products to real users.

goals.name: System Design Mastery
goals.desc: Master distributed systems, concurrency, and high-performance system design.

goals.name: Personal Brand & Website
goals.desc: Publish deep-dive technical articles and launch a personal developer website.

goals.name: Secure AI Internship
goals.desc: Gain hands-on corporate engineering experience building large-scale AI models.

goals.name: Incubate Tech Startup
goals.desc: Formulate a team, design an MVP, and pitch an AI-driven venture to early-stage investors.
